name: Gunhild Holst - Softest Girl
description:
"Program fucking cinnabar pikmin and they can be unlocked by throwing a red pikmin while the gamecube is at room temperature. If this isn't complete by tomorrow, your wages are lost media."

-imonlyhereforpikmin

Welp, new rules suck major dick but I'll adapt. I've already censored all of my previous bots' thumbnails and moved the uncensored images to the bios, so you guys at least still get to look at honkers and wee wees. It's not a huge deal to me, but I get why so many others (especially those with way more bots than I do like Pootlavoti) are very upset with the change, especially since it's affecting older bots even though those really should be left alone unless they break a major rule.

Saw Gunhild's new ref sheet, decided to round out the remakes once and for all.
